---
title: "Activity for 3/2"
author: "Steph Krieger"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
data(midwest)
```

```{r}
midwest |> select(county, state, poppovertyknown, percprof, inmetro) 
```
```{r}
midwest |> select(county, state, poppovertyknown, percprof, inmetro) |> arrange(desc(percprof)) 
```

```{r}
midwest |> select(county, state, poppovertyknown, percprof, inmetro) |> filter(inmetro == "0" & percprof < 5)
```

```{r}
midwest |>
  mutate(popProf = poptotal/percprof) |>
  select(county, state, popProf)
```

```{r}
midwest |>
  group_by(state) |>
  summarise(
    n_counties = n(),
    total_population = sum(poptotal, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_poverty_known = median(poppovertyknown, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_metro = mean(inmetro, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```
